guide:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Elementalist R'Virr wants you to pick up a Red Sash. You can get one for free from Merchant Kalosk.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Elementalist R'Virr sends you to Spiritmaster Rendor, who binds you and sends you off to Coachman Lothi.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Magician Ka'Zuth  
Magician Ka'Zuth wants you to learn how to fight. Go out of the city and kill bats and return to him with two pieces of bat meat.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Magician Ka'Zuth  
Magician Ka'Zuth will make you a new robe. He needs you to get the following items for him:  
- A Cloth Yard - Purchase from Merchant Kertal  
- Common Thread - Purchase from Merchant Kertal  
- Chipped Raven Beak - Drop from Ravens

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Magician Ka'Zuth  
Ka'Zuth next asks you to go slay fire bats and bring back a torn fire bat wing. These spawn in the mountains north of the city.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Talk with R'Virr, he wants you to talk to the waysender, to be teleported to Grobb to talk about an order of frog legs that hasn't come yet. Talk to the waysender and teleport to Grobb. Speak with Chef Grinart. He wants you to bring him two crab legs from the crabs on the beach NW of Grobb. Return to him with the legs. Return to guildmaster.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
First talk to your Elementalist Guildmaster. He informs you that there is a Dark Elf practicing unknown magic, so he wants you to disguise yourself as his apprentice. Go to this Dark Elf, west from Neriak entrance, in his hut by the river.  
He wants you to do some tasks for his magic creation. First, retrieve a claw from a dark clawed crab SE of Neriak by the shore. Second, retrieve a carapace from a fungus roach just across the river from his hut. Bring a friend for the fungus roach because it is an even con at Level 10.  
When you hand in the items, bring a friend because he will summon a yellow con creature. Kill it, loot the carapace, and return to Guildmaster.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Talk to Elementalist R'Virr, he sends you to Lady Furess U'Dedne.  
She wants you to pick up a bracelet she forgot to purchase in Freeport at Merchant Gilgash (costs 226 Tunar). Then go upstairs and talk to Natzik P'Thek about some packages. Natzik says he sent the packages by courier.  
Return to Neriak and give bracelet to Lady Furess. She will tell you to talk to Dragoon V'Ghen at the top of a guard outpost north of Neriak, just past the Firebats.  
Dragoon V'Ghen will tell you to talk to his brother Valraen V'Ghen in the tent below. Talk to Valraen, he cons yellow to level 13. Kill him, loot the packages, and take them to Lady Furess.  
She cannot open it, so go to Freeport, talk to Natzik again. He unlocks the box and gives you the item inside. Take the item back to Lady Furess, then report back to Necromancer D'Unarr.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Talk to R'Virr, he tells you to speak with Zelthil J'Narus. Buy a Lantern of Ages from Merchant Gilgash in Freeport and bring it back.  
Then collect two more items to complete the gift:  
- Gem of Wit from a Lost Thought in Collonridge Cemetery (Level 15)  
- Oriote Raven Claw at the standing stones (Level 15)  
Take both items back to Zelthil, he enchants the lamp and gives it to you. Give the lamp to Lady Furess U'Dedne, then return to Zelthil.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
1. Talk to Elementalist R'Virr. He says Zelthil J'Narus needs your services again.  
2. Zelthil sends you to Quartermaster T'Nak in Fort Seriak.  
3. T'Nak wants 1,000 tunar. He sends you to kill Courier B' Malin (CONs LB) traveling along the River Saren. Exit Neriak heading NW toward the River Saren, cross the river to the SW side and run along it heading NW. Kill Courier B' Malin, loot, return to Zelthil.  
4. Zelthil sends you to kill two mobs, Groundskeepers at Collonridge Cemetery and Castle Felstar (CONs Yel).  
4.1 From Neriak, go west to Lake Nerius, kill Groundskeeper F' Redai at Castle Felstar, loot a femur bone.  
4.2 From Neriak, go southeast to Collonridge Cemetery. Kill Groundskeeper W' Lai in the Tomb of Elders, loot finger bone.  
5. Return bones to Zelthil, he sends you to Elementalist R'Virr.  
6. Talk to Elementalist R'Virr for your reward.
